articles.title: Rafael Nadal's 40th birthday pictures reveal why he and wife Maria copied Novak Djokovic and Jelena’s parenting approach
articles.description: Rafael Nadal celebrated his 40th birthday with wife María Francisca Perelló and their two sons, sharing family photos on Instagram. Like Novak Djokovic and Jelena Djokovic, Nadal chose to hide his children’s faces to protect their privacy. The tennis legend also recently spoke about fatherhood, calling it one of the best experiences of his life and saying he supports his sons’ future choices.

articles.title: Anupam Kher recalls final conversation with Pahlaj Nihalani
articles.description: Veteran actor Anupam Kher has paid a heartfelt tribute to veteran film producer and former CBFC chairperson Pahlaj Nihalani, who passed away on June 4 at the age of 76. Remembering Nihalani as a generous, kind-hearted and genuine person, Kher recalled the important role he played in his career and the support he offered during some of his most difficult moments.

articles.title: Who is AsuraHD? Viral XP bar joke ends in permanent Sykkuno Twitch chat ban and backlash
articles.description: VTuber AsuraHD, also known as JustAsuraa, was permanently banned from Sykkuno’s Twitch chat after posting a joke about the streamer’s famous XP bar meme. The ban quickly went viral on X and sparked debate among viewers. While many felt the message was harmless, others believe moderators acted because of the sensitive timing surrounding Sykkuno’s return stream.

articles.title: 'The Odyssey' becomes most expensive film with 'R' rating
articles.description: Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' has earned an 'R' rating, potentially impacting its box office reach despite a massive $250 million budget. This epic, starring Matt Damon, is set for a July 2026 release, promising grand battles and intense mythological adventures. A new interactive tool allows fans to explore its visual presentation.

The post featured a bold fashion look and quickly received supportive comments from followers. Palmer, who left the UFC after UFC 296 in 2023, continues to enjoy a strong following while focusing on her growing career as a professional painter.

articles.title: “I regret doing it”: Sykkuno breaks silence on cheating controversy and shares emotional update on girlfriend
articles.description: Sykkuno returned to Twitch on June 3, 2026, after a break following a cheating controversy. During his comeback stream, he admitted that his actions toward his girlfriend were “horrible” and said he spent months trying to repair their relationship. He shared that they are now happier together, thanked supporters, and said the experience helped him grow.

articles.title: What is Morgan Gibbs White doing after his England disappointment? Britney De Villiers shares the answer
articles.description: Morgan Gibbs White is spending time with fiancée Britney De Villiers and their children after missing out on England selection. The Nottingham Forest midfielder appeared in photos shared on Instagram during a family holiday. Fans reacted positively to the pictures, with many continuing to support Gibbs White following his omission from the national team squad.

articles.title: Shia LaBeouf pleads guilty to punching people; gets probation
articles.description: Shia LaBeouf received probation and must attend alcohol treatment after pleading guilty to punching three people during Mardi Gras. Video showed the actor assaulting individuals outside a bar, with police reporting homophobic slurs. LaBeouf's attorney called it a "minor bar tussle," while a victim's lawyer emphasized safety for all. This follows a history of legal issues for the actor.

articles.title: Katy Perry and Justin Trudeau introduce their children ahead of first anniversary; relationship grows serious
articles.description: Pop star Katy Perry and Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau are reportedly taking a significant step, introducing their children to each other. This move signals a deepening of their relationship as they aim to thoughtfully blend their families. The couple, who are said to be very serious, are preparing to celebrate their first anniversary together.

articles.title: Pahlaj Nihalani Passes Away At 76, Govinda, Saif Ali Khan & More Pay Their Final Respects I WATCH
articles.description: Veteran film producer and former CBFC chief Pahlaj Nihalani has passed away at the age of 76 after reportedly battling liver-related ailments. Nihalani, who was admitted to Mumbai's Nanavati Hospital, breathed his last on Thursday, leaving the Indian film industry in mourning. Several Bollywood celebrities, including Govinda, Varun Dhawan, Malaika Arora, Saif Ali Khan and others, attended his last rites to pay their final respects. Watch the emotional visuals as the industry bids farewell to one of its most influential producers.

articles.title: Life Advice of the day by Tina Fey: 'You’re not in competition with other women...'-The Mean Girls star's golden advice that changes how we see successs
articles.description: Tina Fey advises that true competition lies not with other women, but with oneself. Her career exemplifies this, as she forged her own path in comedy by focusing on personal growth and skill. This mindset encourages individuals to strive for self-improvement rather than engaging in detrimental comparisons.

articles.title: No AC, no cooler: How a house in Delhi stays 10 degrees cooler even during peak summer
articles.description: A Delhi home remains significantly cooler without air conditioning. The owner's father designed the house with a central courtyard and cross-ventilation. Kota stone floors and air ducts also help. A terrace garden with over 200 plants further reduces heat. This approach saves on electricity bills and promotes a healthier environment.
